idea-plugin.name: V2EX Reader
idea-plugin.description:
Browse V2EX topics, replies, and search results directly inside IntelliJ IDEA.

Features:
  • Home feed with V2EX tabs (all/hot/tech/creative/play/apple/jobs)
  • In-IDE Google search flow for V2EX topics
  • Topic detail + reply list with image rendering support
  • Optional reply posting when A2 token is configured

中文说明：在 IDEA 内查看 V2EX 帖子与评论，支持标签流、搜索、详情与评论查看。
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.12

  • Added in-IDE search browser navigation: Home / Back / Forward / Refresh.
  • Improved search-to-detail flow with topic link interception.
  • Reply editor is collapsed by default for a cleaner detail view.
  • Stability improvements for tab/search request switching.

action.description: 刷新当前 V2EX 列表
在浏览器中打开当前帖子
聚焦 V2EX 搜索输入框
